title: AeroShiftMOVE
description: A dynamic mobility mod that adds double jump, air dash, and controlled gliding to enhance movement freedom in Minecraft.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b80e82fbddfc1f9983d23d4e5ae45d98d02d6bf.jpeg)

## 🆕 Added Features

### 🦘 Double Jump System

- **Press Space** mid-air to perform a second jump
- Smooth and responsive air boost

### ☁️ Controlled Gliding (5s max)

- **Hold Space** while in air to glide
- Designed to recover from falls
- Limited duration for balanced gameplay

### ⚡ Directional Dash

- **Default key: V**
- Fully rebindable in controls
- Works on ground and in air
- Instant forward momentum boost

### ⚙️ Mechanics & Balance

- Vanilla-friendly physics
- No block or combat alteration
- Clean integration into survival gameplay
- Balanced cooldown handling

### 🌍 Compatibility

✔ Singleplayer supported
✔ Multiplayer supported (mod required for all players)
✔ Server compatible (must be installed server-side)
